---
name: Security concern
about: Read SECURITY.md before reporting security-sensitive issues
title: "[Security] "
labels: security
assignees: ""
---

Do not open public issues for vulnerabilities, secrets, credentials, private
keys, tokens, sensitive personal data, or exploitable generated app behavior.

Use the private reporting path in `SECURITY.md`.

Use this public template only for non-sensitive security documentation gaps or
hardening suggestions that do not disclose an exploitable issue.

## Public Hardening Topic

What policy, documentation, or non-sensitive hardening topic should be improved?

## Suggested Change

What should change?
